model_note: Occam-style v7: baryonic Newton baseline plus effective structural dimension Dw, smoothed radial derivative |dDw/dr| as the structural rearrangement source, outward cumulative propagation P, and a saturating propagation-to-gap map.

minimal_story.dDw_dr_i: continuous radial structural change used as rearrangement source
minimal_story.P_i: outward cumulative attenuated sum of |dDw/dr| source from inner shells
